hero.name: Tunahan Erbay
hero.introduction: Hi, I'm Tuni. I build software that is designed to last. With {yearsOfExperience} years of experience across frontend and backend development, I enjoy solving complex technical challenges, improving existing systems, and creating reliable solutions that deliver real value.

education.title: Bachelor of Computer Science
education.summary: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science with a focus on software engineering, programming, databases, algorithms, and practical software development projects.

education.title: Swiss Federal Matura
education.summary: Secondary education with a specialization in Physics and Applications of Mathematics.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.summary: Joined ELCA as a Fullstack Software Engineer and was promoted to Senior Software Engineer in 2025. Over time, I took on additional responsibilities as Scrum Master and Lead Developer, contributing to software architecture, technical decision-making, and the successful delivery of enterprise software solutions. Currently, I am working on a new project, helping establish its frontend, backend, and DevOps foundations while driving development across the full technology stack.
achievements: Promoted from Software Engineer to Senior Software Engineer while taking on additional responsibilities as Scrum Master and Lead Developer.
Led agile delivery processes as Scrum Master during a major release, facilitating collaboration between Swiss and offshore development teams.
Helped establish a new project from the ground up, including frontend, backend, DevOps, and development processes.

experience.title: Web Developer
experience.summary: Built and operated an e-commerce business to gain hands-on experience in web development, digital marketing, and customer acquisition.
achievements: Built a WooCommerce-based e-commerce platform from scratch, including frontend implementation and visual design.
Acquired initial customers through targeted Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns.

experience.title: Founder / Web Developer
experience.summary: Developed and maintained WordPress websites and hosting solutions for private individuals and small to medium-sized businesses. Responsible for the technical implementation, customization, maintenance, and long-term support of client solutions.
achievements: Designed and operated a Linux- and Nginx-based hosting platform for client projects.
Developed, customized, and maintained WordPress websites and plugins for more than 20 clients.

courses.title: Developing Generative AI Applications on AWS
Spring & Hibernate for Beginners
courses.summary: Comprehensive course covering Spring, Hibernate, and Spring Boot development.

courses.title: Kubernetes Native Development with Quarkus
courses.summary: Architecture workshop focused on cloud-native application development using Kubernetes and Quarkus.

courses.title: BPMN Method & Style
courses.summary: Advanced BPMN modeling course including certification.

projects.title: tuni.dev — Portfolio & DevOps Platform
projects.summary: Built and deployed a personal portfolio website with a full DevOps pipeline, covering containerization, GitOps-based continuous delivery, and cloud infrastructure on Kubernetes.
achievements: Built a fully responsive portfolio site in React + TypeScript with Tailwind CSS, with dynamic content driven entirely by a single JSON file.
Built a CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions that builds a Docker image, pushes to GHCR, and auto-updates the Kubernetes manifest on every push.
Deployed k3s on a VPS with ArgoCD for GitOps-based delivery — repo changes sync to the cluster automatically.
Configured Traefik + cert-manager for automatic SSL across multiple subdomains via Let's Encrypt.
Secured the server with a firewall and set up uptime monitoring with a public status page.

projects.title: Bachelor Thesis: Secure Scuttlebutt Kotlin Library
projects.summary: Developed a Kotlin-based implementation of the Secure Scuttlebutt (SSB) group chat protocol and transformed it into a reusable library, enabling secure and decentralized group communication within the Tremola ecosystem.
achievements: Implemented the protocol's core cryptographic functionality, including key derivation, HMAC-based key generation, and secure message encryption/decryption to ensure confidential group communication.
Designed and implemented the Slot/Unslot mechanisms and group identifier mapping, enabling secure recipient access control while preserving group privacy in public references.

projects.title: Data Integration and Analysis Pipeline
projects.summary: Designed and implemented a data integration pipeline for collecting, transforming, and analyzing heterogeneous datasets from multiple sources.
achievements: Analyzed 4 GB of U.S. crime and economic data drawn from multiple sources and mixed datatypes, using SQL and Pandas to integrate them into a single coherent dataset. Performed data cleaning, integration, and visualization.

projects.title: Linux Command-Line Integration Tool
projects.summary: Reimplemented core Linux shell functionality and file system operations in C, including support for remote file system integration.
achievements: Developed a minimal Gnome-Terminal-style shell in C, reimplementing 20+ core commands and adding support for mounting remote servers over SSH so they appear as regular directories.

projects.title: Decentralized Messaging System
projects.summary: Developed a secure decentralized messaging application enabling peer-to-peer communication without relying on centralized servers.
achievements: Built an end-to-end encrypted chat application UI in Python using Tkinter, implementing decentralized peer-to-peer communication over BACnet without relying on a central server.

projects.title: Modular LED Gaming Console
projects.summary: Designed and built a modular LED-based gaming console from scratch, including both hardware and software components.
achievements: Designed and built a custom multiplexed LED matrix with simulated circuitry and hand-soldered components, then programmed a plug-in game framework with joystick input in Arduino/C++.

projects.title: JabRef User Interface Extension
projects.summary: Developed a user interface extension for the open-source project JabRef, enhancing customization and accessibility features.
achievements: Developed and implemented a user interface extension for JabRef, a widely used open-source Java application for managing BibTeX and BibLaTeX databases. The extension provided additional customization options, including themes, color schemes, and templates, while addressing accessibility requirements and enhancing usability.

projects.title: Multiplayer Gorillas Remake
projects.summary: Designed and developed a multiplayer remake of the classic Gorillas game, focusing on game physics, networking, and real-time synchronization.
achievements: Implemented deterministic physics, collision handling, and a real-time peer-to-peer networking layer in Java for synchronized multiplayer.
